description_long: This house features a classic gable roof with a brick exterior and a prominent front entryway flanked by two arched columns. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several mature trees and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with multiple rectangular panes on each visible side. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and a set of stepping stones leading up to the door. The roof is steeply pitched, and the house appears to have a single above-ground story. The overall design suggests a suburban residential setting with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A brick house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, arched front entry, and a detached garage, surrounded by trees and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entryway with arched columns, stepping stones, and the garage to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back yard, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement along the back wall.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the garage, driveway, and the side of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entryway with two arched columns, porch, and stepping stones.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched double-column entry with small porch, steps, and decorative overhang
